mapper.update:
update teacher_profile
real_name = #{teacherExtInfo.realName},
education = #{teacherExtInfo.education},
subject = #{teacherExtInfo.subject},
experience_years = #{teacherExtInfo.experienceYears},
rate_per_hour = #{teacherExtInfo.ratePerHour},
introduction = #{teacherExtInfo.introduction},
city = #{teacherExtInfo.city},
highest_edu_school = #{teacherExtInfo.highestEduSchool},
teaching_mode = #{teacherExtInfo.teachingMode},
default_greeting = #{teacherExtInfo.defaultGreeting},
certificate_urls = #{teacherExtInfo.certificateUrls},
status = #{teacherExtInfo.status},
update_time = now()
where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM teacher_profile WHERE user_id IN
#{uid}
mapper.update: update teacher_profile set edu_verify_status = 1, edu_verify_proof_urls = #{proofUrls}, edu_verify_reject_reason = null, edu_verify_submit_time = #{submitTime}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and edu_verify_status in (0, 3)

update teacher_profile set realname_verify_status = 1, realname_verify_method = 'ID_PHOTO', realname_verify_id_front_url = #{idFrontUrl}, realname_verify_id_back_url = #{idBackUrl}, realname_verify_idno_cipher = null, realname_verify_idno_masked = null, realname_verify_reject_reason = null, realname_verify_submit_time = #{submitTime}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and realname_verify_status in (0, 3)

update teacher_profile set real_name = #{realName}, realname_verify_status = 1, realname_verify_method = 'NAME_IDNO', realname_verify_id_front_url = null, realname_verify_id_back_url = null, realname_verify_idno_cipher = #{idnoCipher}, realname_verify_idno_masked = #{idnoMasked}, realname_verify_reject_reason = null, realname_verify_submit_time = #{submitTime}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and realname_verify_status in (0, 3)

update teacher_profile set realname_verify_status = 2, realname_verify_reject_reason = null, realname_verify_time = #{verifyTime}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and realname_verify_status = 1

update teacher_profile set realname_verify_status = 3, realname_verify_reject_reason = #{reason}, realname_verify_time = #{verifyTime}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and realname_verify_status = 1
update teacher_profile set edu_verify_status = 2, edu_verify_reject_reason = null, edu_verify_time = #{verifyTime}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and edu_verify_status = 1
update teacher_profile set edu_verify_status = 3, edu_verify_reject_reason = #{reason}, edu_verify_time = #{verifyTime}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and edu_verify_status = 1
update teacher_profile set basic_completed = 1, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and basic_completed = 0
update teacher_profile set resume_completed = 1, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and resume_completed = 0
